sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ قِيَمُ الْكَرَمِ وَالضِّيَافَةِ فِي الْمِخْيَالِ الْعَرَبِيِّ رُكْنًا رَكِينًا لَا يَتَزَعْزَعُ.
sentences.translation: Vrijednosti velikodušnosti i gostoprimstva u arapskom imaginarijumu predstavljaju nepokolebljiv stub.
sentences.translationEn: The values of generosity and hospitality in the Arab imagination constitute an unwavering pillar, where the philosophy of giving manifests as the highest expression of human bonds and inherited authenticity.

sentences.arabic: حَيْثُ تَتَجَلَّى فَلْسَفَةُ الْبَذْلِ كَأَسْمَى تَعْبِيرٍ عَنِ الرَّوَابِطِ الْإِنْسَانِيَّةِ وَالْأَصَالَةِ الْمَوْرُوثَةِ.
sentences.translation: Tu se filozofija davanja očituje kao najuzvišeniji izraz ljudskih veza i naslijeđene autentičnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic coffee, with its pungent aroma and bitter taste, is not merely a beverage offered to passersby

sentences.arabic: لَيْسَتِ الْقَهْوَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ، بِرَائِحَتِهَا النَّفَّاذَةِ وَطَعْمِهَا الْمُرِّ، مُجَرَّدَ مَشْرُوبٍ يُقَدَّمُ لِلْعَابِرِينَ.
sentences.translation: Arapska kafa, sa svojim prodornim mirisom i gorkim ukusom, nije samo napitak koji se nudi prolaznicima.
sentences.translationEn: rather, it is an anthropological ritual deeply steeped in symbolism and social significance.

sentences.arabic: بَلْ هِيَ طَقْسٌ أَنْثُرُوبُولُوجِيٌّ مُغْرِقٌ فِي الرَّمْزِيَّةِ وَالدَّلَالَاتِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Naprotiv, to je antropološki ritual duboko uronjen u simboliku i društvena značenja.
sentences.translationEn: Honoring a guest begins from the moment of reception with a cheerful countenance, as it was said of old: 'Greeting a guest with joy is better than feeding him.' The ceremonies of preparing the 'Dallah' follow with exquisite care, where the earth's cardamom blends with roasted coffee beans to compose an aromatic melody that caresses the senses.

sentences.arabic: يَبْدَأُ الِاحْتِفَاءُ بِالضَّيْفِ مُنْذُ لَحْظَةِ اسْتِقْبَالِهِ بِبَشَاشَةِ الْوَجْهِ.
sentences.translation: Iskazivanje počasti gostu počinje od trenutka dočeka s vedrinom na licu.
sentences.translationEn: Offering the cup with the right hand is considered an obligation, not an option, serving as a silent language that reflects the extent of mutual appreciation and respect.

sentences.arabic: إِذْ قِيلَ قَدِيمًا: "لَقَاءُ الضَّيْفِ بِالْبِشْرِ خَيْرٌ مِنْ إِطْعَامِهِ".
sentences.translation: Od davnina se govorilo: "Susret s gostom uz osmijeh bolji je od samog hranjenja." Ceremonija pripreme 'dalle' (posude za kafu) odvija se s izuzetnom pažnjom.
sentences.translationEn: In this context, gatherings transform into platforms for literature and wisdom, where epics are recounted and covenants are preserved.

sentences.translation: Tu se mirisni kardamom miješa s prženim zrnima kafe.
sentences.translationEn: These traditions have remained resistant to disappearance despite the fierce winds of globalization, standing as a living witness to the nobility of lineage and the depth of historical roots.

sentences.arabic: حَيْثُ يَمْتَزِجُ هَيْلُ الْأَرْضِ بِحَبَّاتِ الْبُنِّ الْمُحَمَّصَةِ.
sentences.translation: Tako se stvara mirisna melodija koja miluje čula.
sentences.translationEn: Celebrating the 'other' is not a fleeting duty for Arabs, but rather the essence of an identity that sees a potential friend in every stranger.

sentences.translation: Nuđenje šoljice desnom rukom smatra se obavezom, a ne izborom.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, the Arab home remains open-horizoned to all who come and go, embodying an inexhaustible epic of human giving.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَقْدِيمَ الْفِنْجَانِ بِالْيَدِ الْيُمْنَى يُعَدُّ فَرْضًا لَا نَفْلًا.
sentences.translation: To je nijemi jezik koji odražava stepen uvažavanja i uzajamnog poštovanja.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, the Arab home remains open-horizoned to all who come and go, embodying an inexhaustible epic of human giving.

sentences.arabic: وَهِيَ لُغَةٌ صَامِتَةٌ تَعْكِسُ مَدَى التَّقْدِيرِ وَالِاحْتِرَامِ الْمُتَبَادَلِ.
sentences.translation: U tom kontekstu, medžlisi (okupljališta) postaju govornice književnosti i mudrosti.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, the Arab home remains open-horizoned to all who come and go, embodying an inexhaustible epic of human giving.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي هَذَا السِّيَاقِ، تَتَحَوَّلُ الْمَجَالِسُ إِلَى مَنَابِرَ لِلْأَدَبِ وَالْحِكْمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Tamo se pripovijedaju biografije i čuvaju zavjeti i savezi.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, the Arab home remains open-horizoned to all who come and go, embodying an inexhaustible epic of human giving.

sentences.arabic: حَيْثُ تُرْوَى السِّيَرُ وَتُصَانُ الْعُهُودُ وَالْمَوَاثِيقُ.
sentences.translation: Ova tradicija ostala je otporna na izumiranje uprkos snažnim vjetrovima globalizacije.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, the Arab home remains open-horizoned to all who come and go, embodying an inexhaustible epic of human giving.

sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ ظَلَّتْ هَذِهِ التَّقَالِيدُ عَصِيَّةً عَلَى الِانْدِثَارِ رَغْمَ رِيَاحِ الْعَوْلَمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ona ostaje živim svjedokom plemenitosti porijekla i dubine historijskih korijena.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, the Arab home remains open-horizoned to all who come and go, embodying an inexhaustible epic of human giving.

sentences.arabic: لِتَبْقَى شَاهِدًا حَيًّا عَلَى نُبْلِ الْمَحْتِدِ وَعُمْقِ الْجُذُورِ التَّارِيخِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Slavljenje drugoga za Arape nije prolazna dužnost.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, the Arab home remains open-horizoned to all who come and go, embodying an inexhaustible epic of human giving.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِاحْتِفَاءَ بِالْآخَرِ لَيْسَ وَاجِبًا عَابِرًا لَدَى الْعَرَبِ.
sentences.translation: To je srž identiteta koji u strancu vidi potencijalnog prijatelja.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, the Arab home remains open-horizoned to all who come and go, embodying an inexhaustible epic of human giving.

sentences.arabic: بَلْ هُوَ جَوْهَرُ الْهُوِيَّةِ الَّتِي تَرَى فِي الْغَرِيبِ صَدِيقًا مُحْتَمَلًا.
sentences.translation: Tako arapski dom ostaje otvorenih vidika za svakog putnika namjernika.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, the Arab home remains open-horizoned to all who come and go, embodying an inexhaustible epic of human giving.

sentences.arabic: وَهَكَذَا، يَظَلُّ الْبَيْتُ الْعَرَبِيُّ مَفْتُوحَ الْآفَاقِ لِلْغَادِي وَالرَّائِحِ.
sentences.translation: On utjelovljuje epopeju ljudskog davanja koja nikada ne presušuje.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, the Arab home remains open-horizoned to all who come and go, embodying an inexhaustible epic of human giving.

sentences.arabic: مُجَسِّدًا مَلْحَمَةً مِنَ الْعَطَاءِ الْإِنْسَانِيِّ الَّذِي لَا يَنْضَبُ.
sentences.translation: On utjelovljuje epopeju ljudskog davanja koja nikada ne presušuje.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, the Arab home remains open-horizoned to all who come and go, embodying an inexhaustible epic of human giving.
